description: Capability contract for the /vrs-audit skill. Validates that the full audit execution loop follows the expected behavioral pattern: graph construction, pattern analysis, multi-agent verification, and evidence-backed finding production.

capability_checks.name: builds_knowledge_graph
capability_checks.description: The audit skill must invoke 'alphaswarm build-kg' on the target contracts before any analysis begins

capability_checks.name: produces_findings_with_evidence
capability_checks.description: Each finding must include code location, graph node references, and severity classification

capability_checks.name: spawns_investigation_agents
capability_checks.description: The audit skill must spawn at least attacker and defender agents for multi-agent verification

capability_checks.name: graph_first_compliance
capability_checks.description: BSKG queries must occur before any finding/conclusion output

capability_checks.name: creates_beads_for_findings
capability_checks.description: Each confirmed vulnerability should produce a bead with investigation metadata

expected_behaviors: Reads target contract files before analysis
Builds BSKG knowledge graph as first analytical step
Spawns attacker agent to construct exploit paths
Spawns defender agent to identify guards/mitigations
Produces findings with file:line locations and graph node IDs
